name: aria-reach
description: A static and runtime accessibility analyzer that detects ARIA anti-patterns in shared web component libraries and ranks them by downstream reach (Library Reach Index), so teams fix the issues affecting the most assistive-technology users first. Aids WCAG 2.1 and Section 508 accessibility review; reference implementation of the four-class ARIA anti-pattern taxonomy.
author: Manichandra Sajjanapu

scripts.build:ext: npm run build:browser && cp dist/aria-reach.browser.js browser-extension/aria-reach.browser.js && cp dist/aria-reach.browser.js docs/aria-reach.browser.js
